user.title: Define Loop
user.description: A Loop is a closed water circuit (e.g. fish tank + biofilter + plant bed).

greenhouses_count.title: Greenhouses
greenhouses_count.description: How many greenhouses belong to this Loop? (0 = none)

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse {current} of {total}
greenhouse.description: Name and volume of this greenhouse.

fish_tanks_count.title: Fish Tanks
fish_tanks_count.description: How many fish tanks belong to this Loop?

fish_tank.title: Fish Tank {current} of {total}
fish_tank.description: Name, volume and optional greenhouse assignment.

plant_beds_count.title: Plant Beds
plant_beds_count.description: How many plant beds belong to this Loop?

plant_bed.title: Plant Bed {current} of {total}
plant_bed.description: Name, volume, substrate type and optional greenhouse assignment.

sensor_mapping.title: {component_name} – {sensor_type} ({current}/{total})
sensor_mapping.description: Assign HA sensor entities to measurement roles. All fields are optional — unmapped roles are ignored.

outbound.title: LoopingPilot connection
outbound.description: Endpoint to which the time-series data will be sent.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to LoopingPilot endpoint.

abort.already_configured: A Loop is already configured. Add further Loops as separate integrations.
